creator: philip@FreeBSD.org
text:
westy.tuk stopped accepting TCP connections while other mirrors in North America were down for maintenance.  I'm not sure why geodns isn't pointing them to other places.

I'll have ftp0.chi and ftp0.nyi up again in about 1-2 hours.  They're syncing now.

Meanwhile, I'll try to figure out why gdnsd isn't behaving.
